title: Purged race-sequence CV with embargo before trusting any CV lift
summary: This target is a next-lap event inside driver-race sequences, so ordinary grouped CV can still leak through overlapping temporal context, same-race aggregates, or near-pit boundary effects.
rationale: This target is a next-lap event inside driver-race sequences, so ordinary grouped CV can still leak through overlapping temporal context, same-race aggregates, or near-pit boundary effects. Purged/embargoed validation is recommended in temporally dependent settings specifically to remove overlap-driven optimism.
implementation_hint: Split by `Race_Year`, keep all laps from a driver-race together, and purge/embargo laps around each validation block or around pit-event neighborhoods. Re-rank prior feature ideas only under this stricter CV; prefer ideas whose score survives rather than ideas with the highest raw CV.
expected_effect: May lower reported local CV slightly but should improve leaderboard correlation and reduce false positives from feature mining.
risk: If the competition split is more IID than expected, the stricter scheme can underuse data and hide small real gains.
